requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Conductive Charging System Safety Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 61851传导充电系统安全要求
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 61851傳導充電系統安全要求

summary.en: IEC 61851 is the primary international standard series for electric vehicle conductive charging systems. IEC 61851-1:2017 sets general requirements for EV conductive charging equipment including safety, electrical, and communication aspects. IEC 61851-21-2:2021 sets EMC requirements for off-board EV charging systems. Bahrain's 2025 MEWA EV charging framework mandates technical and safety standards for EV charging equipment, and EWA is empowered to set and enforce these requirements. While the framework does not publish an exhaustive standard list in public sources, IEC 61851 compliance evidence is the internationally recognised baseline expected for EV charging equipment in GCC-aligned markets.
summary.zh: IEC 61851是电动汽车传导充电系统的主要国际标准系列。IEC 61851-1:2017规定了电动汽车传导充电设备的通用要求，涵盖安全、电气和通信方面。IEC 61851-21-2:2021规定了车外电动汽车充电系统的电磁兼容要求。巴林2025年MEWA充电框架规定了充电设备的技术和安全标准，EWA获授权制定和执行相关要求。尽管该框架未在公开来源发布详尽标准清单，但IEC 61851合规证据是GCC对标市场充电设备普遍认可的国际基准。
summary.zht: IEC 61851是電動汽車傳導充電系統的主要國際標準系列。IEC 61851-1:2017規定了電動汽車傳導充電設備的通用要求，涵蓋安全、電氣和通信方面。IEC 61851-21-2:2021規定了車外電動汽車充電系統的電磁兼容要求。巴林2025年MEWA充電框架規定了充電設備的技術和安全標準，EWA獲授權制定和執行相關要求。儘管該框架未在公開來源發布詳盡標準清單，但IEC 61851合規證據是GCC對標市場充電設備普遍認可的國際基準。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-1:2017 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements)
IEC 61851-21-2:2021 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 21-2: EMC requirements for off-board EV charging systems)
GSO IEC 61851-23:2021 (adopted by Bahrain/GCC — DC electric vehicle charging station)
Bahrain MEWA EV charging regulatory framework (November 2025, Official Gazette)

summary.en: China EV charger safety is governed primarily by GB/T 18487.1-2023 (general requirements for EV conductive charging system) and related standards in the GB/T 18487 series. These China-specific standards align with the charging modes and protection concepts of IEC 61851 but differ in specific test requirements, rated voltages, and connector specifications. GB/T 18487.1-2023 compliance does not constitute IEC 61851 compliance.
summary.zh: 中国电动汽车充电设备安全主要由GB/T 18487.1-2023（电动汽车传导充电系统通用要求）和GB/T 18487系列相关标准管理。这些中国专用标准在充电模式和保护理念上与IEC 61851一致，但在具体测试要求、额定电压和接口规范上存在差异。GB/T 18487.1-2023合规不等于IEC 61851合规。
summary.zht: 中國電動汽車充電設備安全主要由GB/T 18487.1-2023（電動汽車傳導充電系統通用要求）和GB/T 18487系列相關標準管理。這些中國專用標準在充電模式和保護理念上與IEC 61851一致，但在具體測試要求、額定電壓和接口規範上存在差異。GB/T 18487.1-2023合規不等於IEC 61851合規。

gap.en: Obtain IEC 61851-1:2017 and IEC 61851-21-2:2021 accredited-lab test reports for the Bahrain-market product variant (with IEC 62196 connectors, 230/400 V, 50 Hz). GB/T 18487.1-2023 test reports are not accepted as a direct IEC 61851 substitute. Confirm with EWA which specific IEC 61851 parts and editions are required under the 2025 MEWA EV framework before product finalisation.
gap.zh: 为巴林市场产品型号（配IEC 62196接口、230/400V、50Hz）取得IEC 61851-1:2017和IEC 61851-21-2:2021认可实验室测试报告。GB/T 18487.1-2023测试报告不被接受为IEC 61851的直接替代。在产品定型前，与EWA确认2025年MEWA充电框架下要求的具体IEC 61851分册和版本。
gap.zht: 為巴林市場產品型號（配IEC 62196接口、230/400V、50Hz）取得IEC 61851-1:2017和IEC 61851-21-2:2021認可實驗室測試報告。GB/T 18487.1-2023測試報告不被接受為IEC 61851的直接替代。在產品定型前，與EWA確認2025年MEWA充電框架下要求的具體IEC 61851分冊和版本。

mandatory_status.target: IEC 61851 compliance evidence expected under Bahrain MEWA 2025 EV charging framework; EWA empowered to mandate specific technical standards for registered EV charging equipment
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487.1-2023 is the recommended standard for China domestic EV conductive charging systems; some requirements are mandatory under China EV charging regulations

source.publisher: Zawya / Bahrain Ministry of Electricity and Water Affairs (MEWA)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] IEC 61851 compliance evidence is the international baseline expected for EV chargers in Bahrain under the 2025 MEWA framework. Obtain IEC 61851-1 and IEC 61851-21-2 accredited-lab reports for the IEC 62196-compliant Bahrain product variant. China GB/T 18487.1-2023 reports are not a substitute.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在2025年MEWA框架下，IEC 61851合规证据是巴林充电设备的国际基准要求。为IEC 62196兼容的巴林市场产品型号取得IEC 61851-1和IEC 61851-21-2认可实验室报告。中国GB/T 18487.1-2023报告不可替代。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在2025年MEWA框架下，IEC 61851合規證據是巴林充電設備的國際基準要求。為IEC 62196相容的巴林市場產品型號取得IEC 61851-1和IEC 61851-21-2認可實驗室報告。中國GB/T 18487.1-2023報告不可替代。
